title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
Apex Fintech is a London-based payments infrastructure company processing over £2bn in transactions daily. We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our Data Platform team.

Role requirements:
- Design, build, and maintain our core data pipelines using Python and dbt
- Strong proficiency in SQL and experience with modern data warehouses (Snowflake or BigQuery)
- Experience with Airflow or similar orchestration tools
- 4+ years of data engineering experience
- This is a full-time office-based role at our Canary Wharf HQ — 5 days per week in office is required
- We do not offer visa sponsorship; applicants must have the right to work in the UK
- Salary: up to £85,000 depending on experience

We are a fast-paced fintech environment and value candidates with prior financial services or payments experience, though it is not essential. You will work closely with quant analysts and product teams to deliver reliable, low-latency data products.

Experience with event-driven architectures (Kafka, Flink) is a strong plus. Familiarity with data quality frameworks (Great Expectations) is desirable. You should have a strong track record of delivering in agile teams.

We value intellectual rigour, pragmatism, and a willingness to own problems end-to-end.

title: Senior Product Manager — SaaS Growth
description:
CloudBridge is a Series B B2B SaaS company helping mid-market companies automate their procurement workflows. We have 120 employees across London, New York, and Sydney. This role is fully remote and open to candidates globally.

We are hiring a Senior Product Manager to lead our Growth product line.

What we need:
- 5+ years of product management experience, with at least 2 years in a B2B SaaS environment
- Proven track record of owning and shipping features that drove measurable revenue or retention impact
- Experience managing and mentoring junior PMs; people management is part of this role
- Strong written and verbal communication skills; you will interface directly with enterprise customers
- Data-driven mindset — you should be comfortable with SQL and product analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel)
- This role is fully remote; we offer flexible hours and an async-first culture
- Visa sponsorship is available for exceptional candidates in eligible locations
- Salary: up to £95,000 (or equivalent in USD/AUD based on location)

Preferred background:
- Experience in procurement, supply chain, or enterprise workflow software
- Prior experience at a company that went through a significant growth phase (Series A to C)
- Exposure to PLG (product-led growth) strategies

We are a values-led company focused on customer outcomes. We do not micromanage — we expect PMs to operate with high autonomy and accountability.

title: ML Engineer — Perception Systems
description:
Stratagem Defence Technologies builds autonomous sensing and perception systems for defence and public safety customers. We are based in Cambridge, UK, with a hybrid working policy.

We are looking for an ML Engineer to work on our core perception models.

Requirements:
- Strong Python skills and hands-on experience with PyTorch
- 3+ years of experience in applied machine learning or computer vision
- Experience training and evaluating deep learning models on real-world datasets
- Familiarity with MLflow or equivalent experiment tracking
- Security clearance: active SC or DV clearance is strongly preferred; candidates without clearance will need to be eligible and willing to undergo vetting
- 2 days per week in our Cambridge office is required (Mon/Wed); the remainder can be worked from home
- Compressed hours (4-day week or 9-day fortnight) are available by arrangement
- Salary: up to £100,000 depending on experience and clearance level

Desirable:
- Experience with ONNX, TensorRT, or model quantisation
- Prior experience in defence, aerospace, or public sector projects
- Knowledge of sensor fusion (LIDAR, radar, optical)

Candidates must be UK nationals (or have held UK permanent residency for at least 5 years) due to the nature of our government contracts. We do not offer visa sponsorship for this role.

This is a technically deep role with significant autonomy. You will work in a small, senior team and have direct input into model architecture decisions.
